ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "repo_url" TEXT /* Repository URL of the project */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch of the repository being used */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the repository */,
  "repo2docker_version" TEXT /* Version of repo2docker used for the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* A more human-readable name for the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "repo_platform" TEXT /* Platform of the repository (e.g., GitHub, GitLab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., build, notebook) */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the test was successful */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test was executed */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who initiated the test */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was run (e.g., staging, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test associated with this result */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path to the log file of the test */,
  "resolved_ref" TEXT /* Resolved reference of the commit tested */,
  "run_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the test run */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the test result */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Detailed data or logs of the test result */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was run */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type (e.g., build, notebook) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the project */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the environment was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "recorded_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_recorded_by FOREIGN KEY ("recorded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
